title: Grant Sanderson (3Blue1Brown) – AI and the future of math
summary: Grant Sanderson discusses AI progress in mathematics as a concrete case study for AI development in other fields. He explores whether AI increases or decreases human understanding, what conceptual breakthroughs look like versus current AI capabilities, and the potential for AI to connect ideas across mathematical literature.
writeup: Grant Sanderson of 3Blue1Brown joins Dwarkesh Patel to treat AI progress in mathematics as a case study for AI development in other fields. The conversation weighs whether AI raises or lowers human understanding, distinguishes conceptual breakthroughs from what current systems can do, and considers AI's potential to connect ideas across the mathematical literature. It touches on proof generation, conceptual innovation, document understanding, and cross-domain transfer.
